tools.notes: FETCH role — unified internet-access CLI; auto-fallback backends; zero mandatory API fees. Returns raw content ingested as secondary blobs. Credentials local-only.

DISCOVERY role — recency-focused (last-30-days) multi-platform synthesizer. Use for LEADS ONLY: mine its cited sources / hot threads, then fetch those underlying sources as raw blobs and chase to primary. NEVER ingest its synthesized brief as a blob (charter Part 37: gatherers return raw material only). Free core (Reddit/HN/Polymarket/GitHub/X-via-cookies); optional keys (Brave/Perplexity/ScrapeCreators/etc). Install: '/plugin marketplace add mvanhorn/last30days-skill' or 'npx skills add mvanhorn/last30days-skill -g'. healthCmd path is install-relative.
